title: Genepool Party
description:
Genepool Party is a mod that adds 4 races to pick from, they are called "Genepools", as the mod name suggests.
It includes the default human, which gets a small buff, as well as a siren, pyrael and voltis!
body:
**WELCOME TO THE WONDERFUL WORLD OF GENEPOOL PARTY!**
_Engage in awesome adventures as whatever race you desire, be it a regular human, an aquatic siren, a flying monster of fire and destruction, or a stingy eletric bastard, I've got you covered._

**RACES:**
**Human:**
- Normal Minecraft experience, but adds a small damage boost for every other human nearby.

**Siren:**
- Has the ability to use goat horns to weaken nearby entities!
- Can live underwater for a very, very long time and moves faster there!
- You heal after not taking damage for a while!
- When on land, you deal less damage.

**Pyrael:**
- All your abilities are disabled when you're soaked, but you're immune to all sorts of fire damage. Oh yeah, and you don't like powder snow, but you can still live in cold biomes, don't worry!
- You can fly as if you have an elytra, even if you don't! Sneaking even gives you slow falling! But uh, 25% of the damage you take while in the air is true damage, ouch.. and uhh.. you have 8 hearts only, good luck.. did I forget to mention you fall out of the sky when you're hit?
- Your fiery spirit sets mobs on fire, and the duration STACKS for every hit!

**Voltis:**
- Oh lord, oh lord. You stun enemies you crit with slow weaponry like an axe. For a good while too! And guess what? It stuns again after a lil bit, automatically, and for a few times too.
- You deal damage to entities you come in contact with, so uhh, no horses.
- Your sprint speed is lower than usual, but  you build up as you run!
- You have permanent Night Vision, and are immune to Blindness!
- You deal 15% less damage. Always.

**OTHER ADDITIONS**
**Soaking:**
- The Soaking is a potion effect that makes you, well, soaked! It is applied by coming in contact with any form of water and can be brewed with something as simple as kelp. Being Soaked allows the Siren to not be weaker when on land, but it also makes the Pyrael.. well.. not as pleasant.
- Oh yeah, it doesn't do much, but, when you take any form of fire damage the effect is removed.. it also cancels any fire-based damage that one time, except lava, I mean.. lava immunity so early on would be kind of busted, wouldn't it?


**Aftershock:**
- The effect used for Voltis' Aftershock ability! Refer there to understand.

_CREDITS TO ALI107 FOR HELPING!_
